message:
perf(ui): eliminate scroll-driven parallax, skip hover effects on touch devices, and simplify grid animations

HeroBackground:
- Remove useScroll/useTransform parallax transforms that fired on every scroll
  pixel, replacing with pure CSS will-change-transform hints on animated blobs
- Eliminates scroll event listener overhead entirely

PromptCard / BundleCard:
- Detect touch devices via matchMedia("(hover: hover)") check
- Skip expensive 3D tilt, glow, and shimmer effects on touch where hover is
  impossible anyway — saves continuous mousemove subscriptions
- Conditionally attach onMouseEnter/Leave/Move only when tilt is enabled
- Guard whileHover scale on tag chips behind enableTilt flag

MagneticButton:
- Same touch detection; skip magnetic displacement math on non-hover devices
- Reduces unnecessary spring animation computations on mobile

PromptGrid:
- Replace motion.div wrapper + layout animation with plain <div>
- Remove GridTransition wrapper (extra AnimatePresence per card)
- Switch AnimatePresence mode from "popLayout" to "sync" for simpler exit handling
- Replace per-card scale+opacity entrance with lightweight opacity-only fade
- Remove useReducedMotion import (now handled per-card instead of per-grid)

CategoryFilter / TagFilter / Hero:
- Add whitespace-nowrap to filter chips to prevent mid-word wrapping
- Hero category bar: use w-max mx-auto instead of justify-center for
  consistent centering without flex shrink
- Add shrink-0 to category buttons to prevent compression
- page.tsx: make RatingFilter and SortSelector full-width on mobile
  (w-full sm:w-[140px]) and wrap the filter row with flex-wrap

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -231,15 +231,15 @@ export function Hero({
             <div
               role="group"
               aria-label="Filter by category"
-              className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 flex-nowrap"
+              className="flex items-center gap-3 w-max mx-auto"
             >
               <MagneticButton
                 type="button"
                 variant={selectedCategory === null ? "primary" : "ghost"}
                 strength={0.2}
                 glowColor="rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.4)"
                 className={cn(
-                  "min-h-0 py-2 px-6 rounded-full text-sm",
+                  "min-h-0 py-2 px-6 rounded-full text-sm whitespace-nowrap shrink-0",
                   selectedCategory === null
                     ? ""
                     : "bg-neutral-100/50 dark:bg-neutral-800/50 text-neutral-600 dark:text-neutral-400 hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-white"
@@ -257,7 +257,7 @@ export function Hero({
                   strength={0.15}
                   glowColor="rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.4)"
                   className={cn(
-                    "min-h-0 py-2 px-6 rounded-full text-sm capitalize",
+                    "min-h-0 py-2 px-6 rounded-full text-sm capitalize whitespace-nowrap shrink-0",
                     selectedCategory === category
                       ? ""
                       : "bg-neutral-100/50 dark:bg-neutral-800/50 text-neutral-600 dark:text-neutral-400 hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-white"
